Overview

The debate between Motion and Smartsheet comes up frequently in online communities and industry forums. Both tools bring unique strengths to the table, and the best choice depends heavily on your specific needs, budget, and technical requirements. We have put together this detailed analysis to help you cut through the marketing noise and focus on what each platform actually delivers.

Feature Analysis

Both Motion and Smartsheet share a solid foundation of core features including Task Management, Ai Assistant, Calendar, Collaboration. On the other hand, Smartsheet uniquely offers Templates, giving it an edge for users who prioritize this area. Looking at user ratings, Motion holds an overall score of 8/10 and an ease of use score of 7/10, while Smartsheet scores 7/10 overall and 6/10 for ease of use. These ratings reflect real user experiences and can indicate differences in usability, support quality, and overall satisfaction.

Pricing Breakdown

When it comes to pricing, Smartsheet comes in at a lower starting price of $9/mo, while Motion begins at $34/mo. Neither platform offers a free plan, so you will need to budget for at least the starting tier from the beginning. Be sure to take advantage of any trial periods they may offer.

Pros & Cons

Motion

  • AI automatically schedules your tasks
  • Protects focus time blocks
  • Combines calendar and task management

Cons

  • -Expensive for individuals
  • -Requires trust in AI scheduling
  • -Limited integrations

Smartsheet

  • Familiar spreadsheet interface
  • Powerful for resource management
  • Strong enterprise governance

Cons

  • -Feels dated compared to modern tools
  • -Expensive for full features
  • -Learning curve for advanced features

Who Should Choose Which?

The ideal user for each platform differs considerably. Motion is best suited for busy professionals, executives, time strapped teams, making it a strong choice if you fall into any of these categories. Smartsheet, meanwhile, shines for PMOs, construction, enterprise operations, which means it may be the better pick if your needs align with those use cases. Founded in 2019, Motion describes itself as "AI-powered calendar that automatically schedules tasks and protects focus time." Smartsheet, established in 2005, positions itself as "Spreadsheet-based work management platform with AI automation for enterprises." With 14 years between them, Smartsheet brings the maturity and proven track record of a veteran platform, while Motion offers the fresh perspective and modern architecture of a newer entrant.

Our Verdict

After analyzing all the data, **Motion** comes out slightly ahead in this comparison, thanks to higher user ratings (8.0 vs 7.0). However, this does not mean Smartsheet is a poor choice — far from it. Smartsheet excels in its own right, particularly for PMOs and construction. Our recommendation: if you value ai automatically schedules your tasks, go with Motion. If familiar spreadsheet interface matters more to you, Smartsheet is the way to go. Either way, both are solid platforms that have earned their place in the market.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Motion better than Smartsheet?
It depends on your needs. Motion scores 8.0 overall while Smartsheet scores 7.0. Motion is best for busy professionals and executives, while Smartsheet excels for PMOs and construction.
Which is cheaper, Motion or Smartsheet?
Motion starts at $34/mo and Smartsheet starts at $9/mo. Overall value depends on which features you need.
Can I switch from Motion to Smartsheet?
Yes, most users can migrate between these platforms. Both Motion and Smartsheet support data import/export. The migration process typically involves exporting your data from one platform and importing it into the other. Some tools also offer migration assistance to make the transition smoother.
What do users say about Motion vs Smartsheet?
On review platforms, Motion holds an overall rating of 8/10 and an ease of use score of 7/10. Smartsheet has an overall rating of 7/10 and ease of use score of 6/10. Users praise Motion for ai automatically schedules your tasks and Smartsheet for familiar spreadsheet interface.
Which should I choose in 2026, Motion or Smartsheet?
In 2026, we recommend Motion for most users based on its overall score and feature set. However, Smartsheet remains a strong contender, especially if you prioritize familiar spreadsheet interface. Try both free trials before committing.
